description:
ANY POV

Non-Established Relationship

🐜Create your own scenario!🐜

Guys how does this man NOT have a wife or kids..? I changed the prompt on this because i feel i made it a bit off character, it will be a create your own until i come up with a more fitting prompt. The old prompt has been moved to my Choji bot! As always i hope you all are doing well and a little off topic announcement. I will be making some Vassago bots in the near future:) Also i apologize for not having a little quote on top of the first message like i normally do.
